raw_consumer_statement:
Macy 's department store. 
My case number with Macy 's is XXXX. This case is referring to two unauthorized charges that were made on my account on XX/XX/year> at Macy 's in XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX, CA. The XXXX. unauthorized purchase amount is {$1000.00} and the 2nd. unauthorized purchase amount is {$390.00}. 

The Macy 's at this location in XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX, CA has closed soon after the charges were made. We are unsure what card was used for the unauthorized transactions. We feel that there may have been other cards that were used for the unauthorized transactions or it is a case of Identity Theft where our information was used to make the unauthorized transactions. 
When calling Macy 's and reporting fraud, they claim that the authorized user personally walked in and made the purchases yet they never clarified how and what methods their purchases were made and never been able to give us proof that it's actually us who made these purchases. The attachments are screenshots that show the details of the unauthorized transactions as well as a police report we filed to open an investigation into this matter. We tried contacting Macy 's support multiple times and nothing was resolved with respect to clearing these unauthorized transactions that we clearly did not make. I contacted Macy 's XXXX department on XX/XX/year> to request updates and the agent told me that the person who investigated these transactions will give me a call within XXXX days to explain how they determined that the authorized user on the card had made the charged. I haven't received a call yet and I believe that I will not receive a call from them as they've been very unprofessional about this whole matter. 
We are not responsible for paying these charges. We would like to make sure we are not paying towards the unauthorized charges that were both made on XX/XX/year>. 
I would also like to add that I was diagnosed with XXXX XXXX late XXXX of this year and I started my XXXX treatment mid XXXX. This unexpected life altering event left our family in shock and fear and the last thing my husband ( the authorized user on the account ) or I would do during this time is head to Macy 's department store and recklessly shop for unnecessary items. 

Thank you for your time.
